decisions.rationale: Valid gap: the incomplete-profile branch in Dashboard.tsx passes greetingRow, beforeGrid, crisisSupport, and dailyCheckIn slots but omits currentPath, chatPreview, and journalPreview. DASH-01 decompose scope explicitly limits this item to the dashboard-main region tree and composable binding with 'no widget internals'; slot placeholder divs with bubble-id markers already satisfy AC-2 and all ui_evidence passes. Populating right-column widget slots in the incomplete branch is owned by downstream items — DASH-05 (ai_RNbBHXSf current path), DASH-06 (ai_RNbBHXSM chat preview, ai_RNbBHXSx journal preview) — whose depends_on gates require the scaffold and useDashboardUser provider, not pre-results branch parity. criteria_audit and functional_audit are all pass; no named DASH-01 ui_ref is missing.

Valid ui-fidelity note: DashboardMain renders beforeGrid inside ai_RNbBHXRE (dashboard-content) while DASH-07 layout_notes specify ContinueOnboardingBanner (bTIpm) as sibling to dashboard-content under ai_RNbBHXRD. However bTIpm is a DASH-07 ui_ref, not in DASH-01 ui_refs; DASH-07 scope owns banner migration, conditional visibility (AUTH-05 signals), and correct page-level nesting. DASH-01 only provides the beforeGrid slot hook for downstream composition. Repositioning the banner now would pre-empt DASH-07 AC-2 and does not block DASH-02..06 depends_on gates, which need the grid slot structure and composable already delivered.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 incomplete-profile branch widget slot population to DASH-05 and DASH-06; C-2 ContinueOnboardingBanner sibling nesting vs dashboard-content to DASH-07 per layout_notes.
